name: Yaman
tagline: Offensive Security | Ethical Hacker | Penetration Tester | Content Creator
bio: I specialize in AI-powered Offensive Security, Red Team Operations, Web & API Penetration Testing, Active Directory Security, and Enterprise Attack Simulation. My focus is building AI-driven offensive workflows, automating reconnaissance, and performing realistic security assessments to identify and validate vulnerabilities in modern enterprise environments.

timeline.title: Started Cybersecurity Journey
timeline.description: Began learning Networking, Linux fundamentals, Windows, and Ethical Hacking.

timeline.title: CTF & Practical Labs
timeline.description: Focused on TryHackMe, eJPT practical labs, Active Directory, Web Application Security, and hands-on penetration testing.

timeline.title: Content Creator
timeline.description: Started creating cybersecurity content on YouTube and Instagram, sharing practical labs, walkthroughs, and offensive security learning.

timeline.title: Cyber Warfare Academy & Enterprise Labs
timeline.description: Advanced through Cyber Warfare Academy, AI-assisted offensive security training, enterprise red team labs, and eJPT-style CTF challenges.
